allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:', d['title']\); print\('client:', d['client']\); print\('detected_areas:', d['detected_areas']\); print\('objectives:', d['objectives']\); print\('scope_items:', len\(d['scope_items']\), 'items'\); print\('disclaimer present:', bool\(d['disclaimer']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:',d['title']\); print\('category:',d['suggested_category']\); print\('filename:',d['suggested_filename']\); print\('tags:',d['tags']\); print\('key_points:',d['key_points']\); print\('--- markdown ---'\); print\(d['markdown']\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('title:',d['title']\); print\('doc_type:',d['doc_type']\); print\('filename:',d['suggested_filename']\); print\('sections:',[s['heading'] for s in d['sections']]\); print\('--- markdown head ---'\); print\(d['markdown'][:400]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('prioritized:',d['prioritized_order']\); print\('focus:',d['suggested_focus']\); print\('blockers:',d['blockers']\); print\('open_questions:',d['open_questions']\); print\('decision_log keys:',list\(d['decision_log_template']\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('required_reviews:', d.get\('required_pull_request_reviews'\)\); print\('required_checks:', d.get\('required_status_checks'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('total:',d['total_findings']\); print\('counts:',d['counts_by_priority']\); print\('order:',d['prioritized_order']\); [print\(f\\"  {i['identifier']} {i['priority']} {i['priority_score']} \({i['suggested_remediation_window']}\)\\"\) for i in d['items']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('results',{}\); print\('flagged files:', list\(r\) or 'NONE'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; prs=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f'#{p[\\"number\\"]} [{p[\\"headRefName\\"]}] {p[\\"title\\"][:60]}'\) for p in prs]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['state']\); [print\(f'  {c[\\"name\\"]}: {c[\\"conclusion\\"]}'\) for c in d.get\('statusCheckRollup',[]\) if c]")
